# Socheli

> Open-source content engine: one idea in — a scripted, voiced, rendered vertical
> video out, published autonomously from the user's own devices and accounts.

- Landing / field manual: https://socheli.com/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Socheli
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/org/socheli
- Privacy: https://socheli.com/privacy
- Data deletion: https://socheli.com/data-deletion
- Contact: contact@socheli.com
